description_long: This urban kiosk features a modern, minimalist design with a flat, overhanging roof equipped with two large solar panels. The structure is primarily composed of dark-colored metal and glass, with a wide open front for customer interaction and a side-mounted digital advertising display. The kiosk sits on a rectangular concrete platform and includes a service counter with shelving for products, as well as a small seating area for waiting patrons. Human figures are present to indicate scale and usage, with the interior partially visible, showing product displays and a service window. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, suitable for use as a newsstand, ticket booth, or small retail outlet in a city environment. The design emphasizes accessibility, weather protection, and energy efficiency.
description: A sleek, modern kiosk with a flat solar-panel roof, open service counter, digital display, and concrete base, designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open service counter, seating area, and two human figures waiting.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof overhang and the open side of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the product shelving, service window, and two standing figures interacting with the kiosk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a large digital advertising display and a single standing figure.
attribute_signage_type: Digital display on the side panel with illuminated advertisement; no visible text on the main structure.
attribute_window_presence: One large open window at the front (service counter), rectangular in shape.
attribute_door_configuration: No visible door; open entryway at the front.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with significant overhang, covered in dark panels and two rectangular solar panels.
